projects.title: Projects
projects.subtitle: Import GitHub repos or upload local projects so the matcher can rank them against any JD.
projects.importDesc: Enter a GitHub username to quickly import public repos. Link GitHub for private repos.
projects.browseByUrl: Or paste a repo URL directly
projects.uploadDesc: Drag & drop a zip file of your project, or click to browse.

resume.resetConfirm: Discard all manual edits and restore AI-generated content?

match.title: Match
match.subtitle: Paste a job description; we'll rank your projects against it.

interview.title: Interview
interview.subtitle: Practice with an AI interviewer that adapts to your projects and target role.
interview.targetedDesc: Select specific projects to deep-dive on, with a required JD.
interview.comprehensiveDesc: Cover your full portfolio — technical breadth, project narrative, growth trajectory.
interview.jdOptionalHint: If provided, questions will focus on the target role.
interview.allProjectsIncluded: All your imported projects will be covered.
interview.noProjects: Import projects first before starting an interview.

repoBrowser.title: Browse your GitHub repos
repoBrowser.desc: Select repos to import. Each will be analyzed for skills.

login.title: Talent Agent
login.subtitle: AI-powered project matching & interview prep
login.hasAccount: Already have an account? Sign in
login.githubHint: Link GitHub to import private repos
login.registerSentBody: We've sent a verification link to {email} (valid for 24 hours). Check your inbox (and spam folder).

verify.successHint: You can close this page and return to the app.
verify.expired: Verification link has expired. Please request a new one from the app.

banner.unverifiedBody: Check your inbox at {email} (incl. spam) to verify your address.
banner.noProvider: Email service not configured — contact admin

forgot.title: Forgot password
forgot.subtitle: Enter your registered email and we'll send a reset link.
forgot.sent: If that email is registered, a reset link has been sent (valid for 1 hour).

reset.title: Reset password
reset.subtitle: Enter a new password (at least 6 characters).
reset.expired: Reset link has expired. Please request a new one.

quiz.title: Knowledge Quiz
quiz.subtitle: AI engineering interview question bank — pick a category, answer, get instant scoring.

landing.heroSub: Match your projects to job descriptions, practice interviews with AI feedback, and generate tailored resume bullets.
landing.feature1Desc: Paste any JD and instantly see which of your projects best demonstrate the required skills.
landing.feature2Desc: Practice with an AI interviewer that adapts questions based on your project and the target role.
landing.feature3Desc: Generate STAR-format resume bullets tailored to specific job descriptions.

resumeUpload.title: Resume Parser
resumeUpload.subtitle: Upload your resume (PDF/DOCX) to extract structured information for interview prep.
resumeUpload.name: Name

manual.title: Add Project Manually
manual.subtitle: For non-code work (academic, design, competitions) — fill in details so the matcher and interviewer can use it.
manual.descPlaceholder: What is the project? What problem does it solve? Your role?
manual.highlightsPlaceholder:
Won 2nd place in regional contest
Reduced power use by 30%
